service.name: DDG Agent-Payable Services
service.description: AI-agent-only paid services for checkout proof, security audits, discovery repair, model/artifact runs, and browser evidence.

capabilities.description: Pay and queue any manual/beta DDG agent service with receipt/status/artifact URLs.

params.service_id: string, required -- service id from pricing/catalog
params.target: object, optional -- URL/repo/goals/files for the requested service

capabilities.returns: 202 with order_id/status_url/artifact_url/receipt_console_url after valid payment; 402 challenge before payment

capabilities.description: Checkout/payment conformance proof for agent-commerce APIs.

params.target_url: string, required -- target service base URL

capabilities.description: Machine-readable profile and probe target for validating DDG checkout behavior.
capabilities.returns: JSON conformance profile with expected headers, routes, and status ladder

capabilities.description: Paid model-router completion endpoint for AI agents with budget caps and receipts.
Bounded agent-task/artifact run using local or provider-backed DDG routes.
Discover healthy free/paid local model routes without raw backend URLs.
capabilities.returns: JSON catalog with runtime/model routes, limits, seat policy, and health-derived availability

capabilities.description: Static safety scan for Hermes/agent skills and workflows; free/lead-magnet beta.
capabilities.returns: JSON risk findings with redacted secret-like evidence

capabilities.description: Operator-reviewed MCP/tool auth, schema, installability, and prompt-injection audit.
capabilities.returns: security report with severity table and remediation steps

capabilities.description: Create or repair llms.txt, OpenAPI, pricing/catalog, agent-skill, and AI discovery files.
capabilities.returns: artifact bundle: discovery files, validation report, publish checklist

capabilities.description: Browser screenshot/DOM evidence bundle for agent QA and buyer proof.
Build publishable agent-discovery surfaces and registry listing packet for an AI service.
capabilities.returns: artifact bundle with .well-known/ai, api-catalog, agent skills, llms/OpenAPI deltas, and listing copy

capabilities.description: Score a domain/API for agent discoverability, auth, MCP, payment, and commerce readiness.
capabilities.returns: scorecard with fixes ordered by agent-discovery impact

capabilities.description: Simulate how a buyer agent discovers and validates a service before spending.
capabilities.returns: discovery/payment/conformance evidence bundle; spending tests approval-gated

auth.identity: Stable agent identity header required for protected routes: X-Agent-Id, X-DDG-Agent-Id, or X-DDG-User.
auth.payments: Public live rails: x402 and direct-crypto. MPP/Tempo is code-ready but not advertised until penny settlement passes.
auth.no_human_checkout: Routes are designed for autonomous clients; missing identity returns 403 before payment.

rate_limits.policy: Route-specific; protected compute is payment-gated and idempotency-key aware.
